case_title: KATHERINE LOH GRAPHIC DESIGN, INC. VS KARP, STEVE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,610.00 FILED BY KATHERINE LOH GRAPHIC DESIGN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KARP, STEVE KARP, GAIL BAY AREA BUSINESS CARDS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KATHERINE LOH GRAPHIC DESIGN, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KARP, STEVE KARP, GAIL BAY AREA BUSINESS CARDS PLAINTIFF DISMISSED AGAINST DEFENDANT - KARP GAIL AND BAY AREA BUSINESS CARDS DUE TO NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF DID NOT PRESENT ANY EVIDENCE OF A CONTRACT BETWEEN THE PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT - KARP, STEVE AS AN INDIVIDUAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KARP, STEVE
